name: Unicycive Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Unicycive Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing innovative therapies for kidney disease. Its two main programs are oxylanthanum carbonate, a next-generation phosphate binder for hyperphosphatemia in chronic kidney disease patients on dialysis, and UNI-494, a drug candidate for acute kidney injury. The company licenses technologies and drugs, then pursues development, regulatory approval, and commercialization.
sellsTo: chronic kidney disease patients on dialysis

exposures.sentence: Our current development programs are focused on two novel therapies: oxylanthanum carbonate, a next-generation phosphate binder for the treatment of hyperphosphatemia in chronic kidney disease patients on dialysis, and UNI-494, a novel drug candidate in development for the treatment of acute kidney injury.

catalysts.event: PDUFA target action date for oxylanthanum carbonate NDA resubmission
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, the FDA accepted the resubmission of the NDA for OLC, deeming the resubmission to be a Class II complete response which has a six-month review period from the date of resubmission, and set a PDUFA target action date of June 29, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Chronic kidney disease (CKD) affects nearly 36 million Americans; approximately 550,000 of them have end stage renal disease and require dialysis.
tamClaims.sentence: Chronic kidney disease (CKD) affects nearly 36 million Americans; approximately 550,000 of them have end stage renal disease and require dialysis.

tamClaims.claim: For an estimated 75% of people in the U.S. on dialysis, hyperphosphatemia remains uncontrolled due to challenges with the six currently available phosphate binders, namely insufficient potency, pill burden and unpalatable formulations.
tamClaims.sentence: For an estimated 75% of people in the U.S. on dialysis, hyperphosphatemia remains uncontrolled due to challenges with the six currently available phosphate binders, namely insufficient potency, pill burden and unpalatable formulations.

tamClaims.claim: AKI affects more than 2 million U.S. patients and costs the healthcare system in excess of $9 billion per year.
tamClaims.sentence: AKI affects more than 2 million U.S. patients and costs the healthcare system in excess of $9 billion per year.

tamClaims.claim: More than 300,000 patients per year in the U.S. die due to AKI.
tamClaims.sentence: More than 300,000 patients per year in the U.S. die due to AKI.
